zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl Basset於1125年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 威爾頓時，她的父親Richard Basset Chief Justice of England35歲，母親Matilda Ridel21歲。她和Robert de Cauz至少有1個女兒。她去世於1185年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl Basset was born in 1125, in Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Richard Basset Chief Justice of England, was 35 and her mother, Matilda Ridel, was 21. She had at least 1 daughter with Robert de Cauz. She died in 1185, in Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl Basset est née en 1125, à Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Basset Chief Justice of England, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Matilda Ridel, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Robert de Cauz. Elle est décédée en 1185, à Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl Basset 1125 in Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Basset Chief Justice of England 35 und ihre Mutter Matilda Ridel 21. Sie hatte mit Robert de Cauz mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1185 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl Bassetが1125年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト ウエルドンで生まれた時，父Richard Basset Chief Justice of Englandは35歳，母Matilda Ridelは21歳であった。彼女はRobert de Cauzとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1185年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアシェルフォードで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl Basset(이)가 1125년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그리트 웰던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Basset Chief Justice of England(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Ridel(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Cauz(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 셸퍼드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl Basset родилась в 1125 г. в местности грит велдон, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Basset Chief Justice of England было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Ridel, 21. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Robert de Cauz. Она умерла в 1185 г. в местности шелфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
